welcome.title: Welcome to MAP Guard
welcome.description: Get started by configuring your MAP policies and admin blocks in the {setupLink}.

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.description: MAP Guard helps you maintain minimum advertised price policies across your Shopify store. Here's how to get started:
getting_started.step_1: Setup Metafields: Configure the required metafields for storing MAP data
getting_started.step_2: Configure Admin Blocks: Enable the product and variant admin blocks in your theme
getting_started.step_3: Set MAP Prices: Use the admin blocks or products page to set MAP prices for your variants
getting_started.step_4: Monitor Compliance: Track compliance status and manage violations from the dashboard

metafield_setup.required_description: {count} metafield definition{plural} need to be created before you can use MAP Guard. Click the button below to create them automatically.
metafield_setup.complete_description: All required metafield definitions have been created. You can now configure MAP settings for your products.

admin_block.title: Admin Block Configuration
admin_block.description: The MAP Guard admin block will appear on product detail pages in your Shopify admin. This block provides quick access to MAP settings for each product variant.
features: Variant Overview: See all variants with their MAP status at a glance
Quick Actions: Edit MAP prices, toggle MAP protection, and set new MAP values
Status Badges: Visual indicators for Active, Violation, Disabled, and Not Set states
Compact Design: Table-like interface with pagination for products with many variants
access_steps: Go to any product in your Shopify admin
Scroll down to find the "MAP Guard" block in the sidebar
Use the block to manage MAP settings for all product variants
admin_block.note_missing: Note: The admin block will only display MAP data after the metafield definitions are created. Create the metafields above to enable full functionality.
admin_block.ready: Ready! The admin block is now fully configured and ready to use. Visit any product page in your admin to start managing MAP settings.

variant_admin_block.title: Variant Admin Block Configuration
variant_admin_block.description: The Variant Admin Block provides MAP management for individual product variants. This block appears on product variant detail pages in the Shopify admin.
features: Toggle Control: Enable/disable MAP enforcement per variant
Status Badge: Visual compliance indicator (Compliant/Violation/Not Set)
Inline Editing: Direct MAP and Final price editing
Custom Messages: Editable MAP enforcement messages
Delete Function: Remove MAP settings when needed
variant_admin_block.note_missing: Note: The variant admin block will only display MAP data after the metafield definitions are created. Create the metafields above to enable full functionality.
variant_admin_block.ready: Ready! The variant admin block is now fully configured and ready to use. Visit any product variant page in your admin to start managing individual variant MAP settings.

theme_block.title: Theme Block Configuration
theme_block.description: The MAP Guard Theme Block displays discount messages on your storefront product pages. This block allows customers to see MAP-related messaging and automatically strikes through prices below MAP.
installation_steps: Access Theme Editor: Go to Online Store → Themes → Customize
Navigate to Product Page: Select "Product pages" from the template dropdown
Add Block: Click "Add block" or "Add section" and look for "MAP Guard Message"
Position Block: Place it near the product price area for best visibility
Configure Settings: Customize the message, icon, and styling options
features: Configurable Icons: Choose from cart, tag, discount, or info icons
Custom Messages: Display default or variant-specific discount messages
Price Strike-Through: Automatically strikes through prices below MAP
Responsive Design: Works on desktop and mobile devices
Theme Integration: Matches your store's design seamlessly
customization_options: Message Settings: Default text, font size, weight, and color
Icon Settings: Show/hide, type selection, size, and color
Block Styling: Background, border, radius, padding, and margin
Testing: Fallback MAP price for development
message_priority_steps: Custom Variant Message: From variant metafield map_guard.discount_message
Block Default Message: Set in theme editor (default: "Add to cart for lower price")
Fallback Message: Hard-coded backup if nothing is configured
theme_block.strike_through_description: When enabled, this feature automatically detects price elements on the page and strikes through prices that are below the MAP price. It works with most Shopify themes and handles:
theme_block.note_missing: Note: For the theme block to display variant-specific messages and MAP data, create the metafield definitions above first. The block will work with default messages even without metafields.
theme_block.ready: Ready! The theme block can now access metafield data. Install it in your theme editor and start customizing the storefront experience.

next_steps.title: Next Steps
steps: Install Theme Block: Add the MAP Guard Message block to your product pages in the theme editor
Configure Theme Block: Customize the message, icon, styling, and enable price strike-through
Test Admin Blocks: Visit product and variant pages to test the MAP Guard admin blocks
Set MAP Prices: Start configuring MAP settings for your products and variants
Configure Messages: Set up custom discount messages in Settings or per-variant
Monitor Compliance: Use the Products page to track MAP compliance across your catalog

help.title: Need Help?
help.description: Having trouble with setup or configuration? Check out our comprehensive {faqLink} for answers to common questions about metafields, admin blocks, theme configuration, and troubleshooting.

delete_modal.title: Delete MAP settings
delete_modal.description: Are you sure you want to delete MAP settings for the selected variants? This action cannot be undone.

empty_state.title: No products configured
empty_state.description: Start by adding MAP prices to your products

banner.title: Message Configuration
banner.description: Configure how MAP messages appear on your product pages. Changes will apply to all products with MAP protection enabled.

message_content.title: Message Content
message_content.default_message_placeholder: Add to cart for lower price
message_content.default_message_help: This message will be displayed instead of showing the discount amount.
message_content.custom_css_help: Add custom CSS to further customize the appearance.

visual_styling.title: Visual Styling
visual_styling.text_color_help: Choose the text color for MAP messages.
visual_styling.background_color_help: Choose the background color for MAP messages.

icon_settings.title: Icon Settings
icon_settings.icon_type_help: Choose an icon to display alongside the MAP message.

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: This is how your MAP message will appear on product pages.

usage_tips.title: Usage Tips
tips: Use action-oriented language like "Add to cart"
Test different styles to match your theme
Consider your brand colors and fonts

common_messages.title: Common Messages
common_messages.add_to_cart: Add to cart for lower price

plans.title: Plans & Pricing
plans.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your MAP compliance needs

banner.title: Choose Your Plan
banner.description: Select the plan that best fits your store's needs. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Billing is handled through Shopify App Billing.

usage.title: Current Usage & Limits
usage.description: Track your current usage against your plan limits

plan_descriptions.free: Perfect for testing and small stores

change_plan.question: Can I change my plan anytime?
change_plan.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and billing is prorated through Shopify.

billing.question: How does billing work?
billing.answer: All billing is handled securely through Shopify App Billing. Charges appear on your Shopify invoice alongside your other app subscriptions.

limits.question: What happens if I exceed my product limit?
limits.answer: We'll notify you when you approach your limit and help you upgrade to a plan that fits your needs. Your existing MAP settings will continue to work.

help_banner.title: Need help choosing?
help_banner.description: Our support team can help you select the right plan based on your store size and MAP compliance requirements.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about MAP Guard

banner.title: Need Help?
banner.description: Find answers to common questions about MAP Guard setup, configuration, and troubleshooting. If you can't find what you're looking for, check the Setup page for detailed configuration guides.

questions.question: What is MAP (Minimum Advertised Price)?
questions.answer: MAP is the lowest price a retailer can advertise a product for sale. It helps maintain brand value and ensures fair competition among retailers.

questions.question: How does MAP Guard work?
questions.answer: MAP Guard automatically monitors and enforces your minimum advertised prices by displaying custom messages when prices fall below your set thresholds.

questions.question: Is MAP Guard compatible with all Shopify themes?
questions.answer: Yes! MAP Guard uses smart CSS selectors that work with most Shopify themes. The price strike-through feature automatically detects price elements regardless of theme structure.

questions.question: Can I customize the messages shown to customers?
questions.answer: Absolutely! You can set default messages in the theme editor and override them with custom messages per product variant using metafields.

questions.question: Does MAP Guard affect my store's performance?
questions.answer: No, MAP Guard is optimized for performance. The theme block uses efficient JavaScript and CSS that doesn't impact page load times.

questions.question: What happens if I don't set up metafields?
questions.answer: The admin blocks will show placeholder data and the theme block will use default messages. For full functionality, you should create the metafield definitions in the Setup page.

questions.question: How do I install the theme block?
questions.answer: Go to your Shopify admin > Online Store > Themes > Customize. Add the MAP Guard block to your product pages where you want price protection to appear.

questions.question: Can I customize the enforcement message?
questions.answer: Yes! You can customize the message text, styling, and icon through the Settings page to match your brand.

questions.question: How do I get started with MAP Guard?
questions.answer: Start by going to the Setup page and clicking 'Create Missing Metafields'. This sets up the required data storage for MAP Guard to work properly with your products and variants.

questions.question: Why do I need to create these data fields?
questions.answer: These data fields (called metafields) allow MAP Guard to store MAP prices, settings, and custom messages directly in Shopify. Without them, the admin tools won't be able to save your MAP configuration.

questions.question: What happens if I accidentally delete the setup data?
questions.answer: Deleting the setup data will remove MAP prices and settings from all products and variants. The MAP Guard blocks will fall back to default behavior. You can recreate the setup from the Setup page, but you'll need to reconfigure your products.

questions.question: Can I modify the data fields after creating them?
questions.answer: Once created, the data fields cannot be easily modified through MAP Guard. You would need to delete and recreate them, which will lose existing data. It's best to set them up correctly the first time using our Setup page.

questions.question: How do I know if the setup worked correctly?
questions.answer: After completing setup, visit any product page in your admin. You should see the MAP Guard admin block with options to set MAP prices. Look for 'Created' status on the Setup page.

questions.question: What if the setup process fails?
questions.answer: Check your app permissions and try again. If it continues to fail, ensure you have the necessary permissions to create data fields in your Shopify store. You may need store owner or staff permissions.

questions.question: Is there a free trial?
questions.answer: Yes! We offer a free plan that allows you to test MAP Guard with up to 10 products before upgrading to a paid plan.

questions.question: How is billing handled?
questions.answer: All billing is processed securely through Shopify's App Billing system. Charges appear on your regular Shopify invoice.

questions.question: Can I change my plan anytime?
questions.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and billing is prorated through Shopify.

questions.question: What happens if I exceed my product limit?
questions.answer: We'll notify you when you approach your limit and help you upgrade to a plan that fits your needs. Your existing MAP settings will continue to work.

questions.question: Do you offer refunds?
questions.answer: Since billing is handled through Shopify, refund policies follow Shopify's standard terms. Contact support for assistance with billing issues.

questions.question: Is there a discount for annual billing?
questions.answer: Currently, all plans are billed monthly through Shopify. We're considering annual billing options with discounts for the future.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: All payments are processed through Shopify, so any payment method accepted by Shopify for app subscriptions will work with MAP Guard.

questions.question: The theme block isn't showing up
questions.answer: Make sure you've added the MAP Guard theme block in your theme editor and that you have products with MAP prices configured.

questions.question: MAP enforcement isn't working
questions.answer: Check that your products have MAP prices set and that the theme block is properly installed on your product pages.

questions.question: The MAP Guard tools aren't showing up. What should I check?
questions.answer: Try these troubleshooting steps: 1) Ensure initial setup is completed (Setup page), 2) Check that the latest app version is deployed, 3) Refresh your browser and clear cache, 4) Verify the app is properly installed and permissions are granted.

questions.question: I'm getting errors during setup. How do I fix this?
questions.answer: This usually indicates a permissions issue. Ensure your Shopify user account has the necessary permissions to create data fields. You may need store owner or staff permissions.

questions.question: The storefront display is showing but not working correctly. What's wrong?
questions.answer: Check the browser console for error messages. Common issues include incomplete setup, incorrect MAP price configuration, or theme compatibility. Enable the fallback MAP price for testing.

questions.question: How do I reset MAP Guard if something goes wrong?
questions.answer: You can delete the data fields from the Setup page to reset everything, then recreate them. For storefront displays, you can remove and re-add them in the theme editor.

questions.question: Who can I contact for additional support?
questions.answer: For technical support or theme-specific assistance, contact our support team through the Shopify App Store or use the support channels provided in your MAP Guard app dashboard.

questions.question: The price strike-through isn't working on my theme
questions.answer: Some themes have unique price structures. Try enabling the fallback MAP price for testing, and contact support with your theme name for specific compatibility assistance.

questions.question: Can I test MAP Guard without affecting my live store?
questions.answer: Yes! Use a development theme or preview mode to test MAP Guard functionality. The admin blocks work in any environment, and you can test the theme block in preview mode.

contact.title: Still need help?
contact.description: Contact our support team for personalized assistance with your MAP compliance needs.
